scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @crowdtolive/web" "npm run dev -w @crowdtolive/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @crowdtolive/shared && npm run build -w @crowdtolive/api && npm run build -w @crowdtolive/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @crowdtolive/shared && npm run lint -w @crowdtolive/api && npm run lint -w @crowdtolive/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @crowdtolive/shared && npm run typecheck -w @crowdtolive/api && npm run typecheck -w @crowdtolive/web
